message:
ext(rtree): implement bd-1gae R*-tree spatial index + geopoly format functions

Expand fsqlite-ext-rtree with full R*-tree spatial indexing API:
- MBoundingBox: multi-dimensional bbox (1-5 dims) with overlap/union/volume
- RtreeConfig/RtreeIndex: spatial index with insert/delete/update/range_query
- RtreeGeometry trait + RtreeQueryResult for custom geometry callbacks
- RtreeCoordType: Float32 (default) and Int32 (rtree_i32) variants
- geopoly_blob/geopoly_blob_decode: binary format (4-byte header + f32 pairs)
- geopoly_json/geopoly_json_decode: GeoJSON coordinate array format
- geopoly_svg: SVG path rendering
- 31 tests covering creation, CRUD, range queries, custom geometry pruning,
  10K-entry dataset, all geopoly functions, binary format, and MBoundingBox

Clippy-clean (pedantic+nursery), fmt-clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
